name: [AT] MVA Cancellation Notifier
description: Automatically notifies the Placements, PDEV, and Coach teams via email and Slack when an MVA cancellation is submitted, including the client, VA, reason, summary, and last working day.

parameters.text:
=Hi team,

An MVA Cancellation for *{{$json.mvaPairText}}* has been submitted via Airtable forms. Their last day will be on *{{$json.mvaLastWorkingDayText}}*.

schema.id: Final SV Base Rate from VAP
schema.displayName: Final SV Base Rate from VAP
